Limit  (cost=6.28..8.97 rows=10 width=24)
  ->  Nested Loop  (cost=6.28..293.89 rows=1070 width=24)
        ->  Index Scan using embeddings_stub_stub_model_hnsw_idx on embeddings_stub_stub_model e  (cost=6.14..66.73 rows=1070 width=48)
              Order By: (embedding <=> '[1,0,0,0,0,0,0,0]'::vector)
        ->  Index Only Scan using chunks_pkey on chunks c  (cost=0.15..0.21 rows=1 width=16)
              Index Cond: (id = e.chunk_id)
